description: A cargo owner submits a claim, stating their container was damaged while in the terminal's care.

nodes.task_description: Receive the claim and log it in the claims management system.

expected_outcome.value: A new claim file is created with all the customer's details and allegations.

nodes.task_description: Investigate the claim by reviewing the container's full movement history and any damage photos taken at the gate.

expected_outcome.value: Claims handler reviews the history and finds a gate photo showing the damage was pre-existing upon arrival.

nodes.task_description: Respond to the claimant with the findings, denying the claim and providing the evidence (the gate photo).

expected_outcome.value: A formal response denying liability is drafted and sent to the customer with the supporting evidence.
